titles.title: Up from the Grave He Arose

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Low in the grave he lay, Jesus my Savior, Waiting the coming day, Jesus my Lord!

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Vainly they watch His bed, Jesus my Savior, Vainly they seal the dead, Jesus my Lord!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Death cannot keep its prey, Jesus my Savior; He tore the bars away, Jesus my Lord!
